description.p: OpenAstro PHD2 is a fork of the PHD2 telescope guiding software with Alpaca and INDI as the only equipment-driver paths. It pairs naturally with AlpacaBridge for network-based equipment access and with a remote INDI server for Linux/Pi rigs.

ul.li: Easy-to-use, “push here dummy” guiding for beginners
Sophisticated guiding and analysis tools for experienced users
ASCOM Alpaca and INDI camera/mount/rotator support
Embedded web portal and headless mode
